name: So'lek
description:
Blank starter | 2 SFW starters (Mild From the Ashes spoilers in the second starter)

So'lek packed with as much information as I could give him, tried real hard to make him accurate. Was originally made with default j.llm settings in mind but I'm no longer confident he is accurate without an external API. Deep apologies to people who use j.llm.

So'lek currently DOES NOT speak accurate Na'vi. To mitigate errors, "Na'vi dialogue" will be written "<Like this.>" until I can write a lorebook that accurately generates the language.

NOTE: I have tested with Gemini and Claude as external APIs and have had moderate success. If you want to attempt, I put this in the long term memory: [Narration note: Write So'lek's dialogue in the Na'vi conlang "fa fìfya'o." <With English translations.> to avoid confusion when inaccurate words happen.] Note that Na'vi dialogue still is wonky, but you might be able to have some decent success with enough nudging.

Edit:
12/20/25 - Full name added. Currently going through From the Ashes and will update profile with any new backstory. Events from the DLC narrative WILL NOT BE ADDED, backstory ONLY. (I may change my mind on this if anyone leaves a comment requesting I add the game information) If you want to play with So'lek during From the Ashes, just give the chatbot information as needed in OOC messages or in the long term memory.

- Additional edit: Added a blank starter + an additional starter where So'lek is at his camp in the floating mountains. Setting is meant to allude to being during From the Ashes, but So'lek will have no information of the events of the DLC. You can consider this being during the beginning of the DLC. Attempted to add So'lek's "warrior sense", but I have a feeling this will only work properly with an API like Claude.

12/22/25 - Didn't realize So'lek wasn't updated with the usual behavioral and intimacy parameters I've been putting on my other chatbots. Hopefully now there should be less "rehashing" of messages, and more proactive engagement from So'lek. Additionally, the intimacy engine tends to help NSFW not be so same-y. To a point. LLMs be LLMs.

01/01/26 - Added a small tsaheylu lorebook to hopefully polish up LLM generation. Haven't tested on So'lek yet, but it worked well on another character. I got a weird -CONNECTION ESTABLISHED- generated but the rest was great and I only edited out that tiny error.

- Additional update: Added the same Mangkwan lore card used with Varang. The Mangkwan that appear in From the Ashes are in the lore card with information more or less as it appears on their character cards in game. Wukula, Zari, Rakx, and Ka'sam all have full profiles, other minor Mangkwan raiders make appearance in name only. A few have basic descriptions of their appearance but no concrete personality if the character's card had the default Mangkwan flavor text about them. None of the characters have context for the setting, so I suggest OOC nudging context in or to put those lore reminders in narration for best results.

- Additional update 2, electric boogaloo: Added a Sarentu clan lore card. It's fairly basic, but should be decently functional as-is. Tamtey is added but I attempted to keep the trigger keys to Tamtey and The Sarentu ("the Sarentu" shouldn't trigger it) I'll slowly be polishing up this specific lore card along with the other clan and world cards I am writing. Got a lot on the burner right now.

01/10/26 - Added lore books for the Resistance and the RDA. Lore books were primarily intended for Bukowski, results were so good I wanted to nudge them onto So'lek. Let me know how things go in the comments, if that helps supplement narration enough to allow From the Ashes timelines to be played smoothly despite the lack of spoiler content from the DLC.
creator: mogshade
